description_long: This is a life-sized bronze statue of a man dressed in traditional Japanese attire, standing atop a tall, rectangular stone pedestal. The figure holds an object in his left hand and has a sword sheathed at his side, suggesting a historical or cultural significance. The pedestal is set on a square stone base, bordered by short stone posts connected by chains, demarcating the sculpture's area. The surface of the statue and pedestal shows weathering, giving it a dark, aged patina. There is a plaque or inscription on the front face of the pedestal, likely providing information about the figure or dedication. The overall composition is formal and commemorative, suitable for a public or historical urban setting.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a man in traditional Japanese clothing stands on a tall stone pedestal, bordered by stone posts and chains. The figure holds an object and has a sword at his side, with a plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, the object in his left hand, the sword at his side, and the plaque on the pedestal.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the sword's position, and the depth of the pedestal.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the figure and pedestal, with no visible plaque or details on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, the sword, and the side of the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure in traditional Japanese attire
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved or stone surface, likely in a public urban or park setting.
